name: Ines & W; Information Gathering (Arknights)
description:
Ines could only sigh as she was told Hoederer needed something information wise from a third party, located in the northern birch forests of Kazdel.

But it wouldn't be fun if W didn't tag along, and Ines was just too tired to complain about W today. So off Ines and W went to collect this information.
creator: RPKAppreciator
